The '''bio-stabilizer implant''' was a [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] device which was used [[4000 BBY/Legends|4,000]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. They were essentially micro-[[Computer/Legends|computers]] that were implanted inside the body of the user and monitored the circulatory system. Undesirable contents in the [[Blood/Legends|blood]] were removed by way of a complex algorithm in the implant, allowing the implant to maintain the user's body stability. This same system allowed the implant to detect drops or surges in nerve transmission rates within the body. The bio-stabilizer implant also stored and transmitted basic knowledge of various [[Poison/Legends|poisons]] and toxins into the mind of its user, teaching the [[Brain/Legends|brain]] to synthesize antidotes. The user of a bio-stabilizer implant was essentially immune to poison.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
